context: Cancelled Cursor + Windsurf, moved to Claude Code + Cline. Says Cursor hit diminishing returns.
dm_preview: Hey Karthik — saw you made the jump to Claude Code + Cline. Smart move. We built Voco as a voice layer on top of Claude Code — lets you talk through code changes instead of typing everything. Cuts the back-and-forth with the agent in half. Since you're already in the Claude ecosystem, might be worth a look: https://itsvoco.com

context: Unsubscribed from Cursor + Windsurf, went to VS Code + Codex. Frustrated by paying for 3+ subscriptions.
dm_preview: Hey Max — saw your post about consolidating dev subscriptions. Totally get it. We built Voco as a voice-first coding layer that works with VS Code — no new IDE, no extra subscription on top of what you already have. Just talk to your code. Might solve the "too many tools" problem: https://itsvoco.com

context: Cancelled Windsurf subscription. Looking for alternatives.
dm_preview: Hey Ivan — saw you dropped Windsurf. Curious what you landed on. We're building Voco — voice-powered coding that plugs into whatever IDE you're using now. No lock-in, works with your existing setup. Happy to show you a quick demo if you're interested: https://itsvoco.com

context: Cancelled Windsurf. Frustrated that most models fail at tool calling aside from Sonnet.
dm_preview: Felt this. Tool calling is broken on most models. We built Voco on top of Claude's Sonnet — the one model that actually works for it. Voice commands that reliably execute. Might be what you were looking for in Windsurf: https://itsvoco.com
